description:
"S3XY [[hot single]] 1N UR 4R34 !11"

Art and character by Suggestoaster

______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Heyyy guys! It's me! raglefagle AGAIN!! I know I know...another month without bots..I'm SORRRYYYY- Hopefully I can like..port some of my bots from other sites over here/port bots from other sites I find to satiate you guys until I make a new one..lemme know how y'all feel about that idea in the comments down below!

But hey! That's besides the point! I got this one out, and it's the first (and probably the last bot) I'll make with example dialog! that's mainly the reason that this bot is like...3k+ tokens lol...It was really a pain to type out all of that dialogue and actually get her to talk like Spamton, but hopefully it makes the bot speak right. If it doesn't then uhm...tell me and I'll figure something out. I think. I hope.

Also side note, I actually didn't make the first bot of Reese! That honor goes to @Neurons_gone's bot of Reese, so shoutouts to them!

Honestly, this bot really wasn't even supposed to be a thing. I was just scrolling rule34, kinda looking for some good Alien Elliot PFP's for what's HOPEFULLY the next bot, and then I stumbled across the post where she's digging in her ass, and in that moment my brain was re-wired to make this bot instantly.

I kinda crunched the entirety of last night to finish writing the example dialog and finish a bit of the personality section, now I'm finishing it this morning...So all in all, this is the quickest I've made a bot that wasn't in my spicychat days!

Anyway, that's all I need to say for now, have fun with this bot, make sure to drink plenty of water, leave any complaints or bot requests in the comments, and have a great day!
